| New Insights in System Activity | - **Insight #1:** Limit post-query processing usage (pivots, totals/ grand totals)<br>- **Insight #2:** Reduce query complexity from Warehouse design<br>- **Insight #3:** Reduce Cloud Cost from Dashboarding Tool<br> ◦ Not a current priority as organization is promoting adoption<br> ◦ Cost estimation from compute slots is available<br>- **Other discussions:**<br> ◦ Board monitoring<br> ◦ Multi-instance use case | - 🗒️ **Internal team**: review the first two insights<br>- 🗒️ **External team**: explore the `demo_board data availability & insights` |
